title: JourneyMap Teams
description: An addon for JourneyMap which provides integration with Supported Teams mods and Vanilla Teams.
body:
JourneyMap-Teams

A client+server mod for Forge, NeoForge, Fabric, and Quilt that is an addon for JourneyMap which provides integration with Supported Teams mods and Vanilla Teams. 

Help and Documentation

Support available on JourneyMap Discord server

Server - Optional

Hides players that are not a members of your team or allies of your team. 

Client - Optional

Colors the icons of team mates and name tag based on the team color. This includes allies.

Support Team Mods:

  • FTB Teams Forge and Fabric
  • Vanilla Teams
  • Better Teams via Paper plugin

Please request more teams mods to add support.
